subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Hearken thou unto the Call, for it maketh mention of thee with that which shall gladden the eyes of them that have turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and have quaffed the choice wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن ان استمع الندآء انه یذکرک بما تقر به عیون الذین اقبلوا الی الافق الاعلی و شربوا رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
